title: Ubiquiti NanoStation Loco M5, outdoor, 5GHz MIMO, 2x 13dBi, AirMAX
description: Ubiquiti NanoStation Loco M5 is a powerful completely outdoor unit including 2x 13dBi (2x2 MIMO) antennas for the 5GHz band as a CPE solution suitable for shorter distances. The unit allows transmission speed up to 300Mbps . Compared to its predecessor has a stronger processor clocked at 400MHz and bigger memory.
